inputs.label: Number of Travelers
inputs.businessContext: Number of people traveling; multiplies per-person costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of people traveling; multiplies per-person costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Seyahat eden kişi sayısı; kişi başı maliyetleri çarpar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der reisenden Personen; multipliziert die Kosten pro Person.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de personnes voyageant ; multiplie les coûts par personne.

inputs.label: Number of Nights
inputs.businessContext: Duration of stay in nights; used for hotel and daily expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of stay in nights; used for hotel and daily expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gece cinsinden konaklama süresi; otel ve günlük harcamalar için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufenthaltsdauer in Nächten; wird für Hotel- und Tagesausgaben verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du séjour en nuits ; utilisé pour l'hôtel et les dépenses quotidiennes.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Her yolcu için gidiş-dönüş uçak bileti maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût du vol aller-retour par voyageur.

inputs.label: Hotel Cost per Night (Total)
inputs.businessContext: Total accommodation cost per night for the group.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total accommodation cost per night for the group.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Grup için gece başına toplam konaklama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtunterkunftskosten pro Nacht für die Gruppe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total d'hébergement par nuit pour le groupe.

inputs.label: Daily Food Cost per Person
inputs.businessContext: Estimated daily meal and drink cost per person.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated daily meal and drink cost per person.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başı tahmini günlük yemek ve içecek maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte tägliche Kosten für Mahlzeiten und Getränke pro Person.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût estimé des repas et boissons par jour et par personne.

inputs.label: Activities Cost per Person
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of excursions and activities per person.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of excursions and activities per person.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başı gezi ve aktivitelerin toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten für Ausflüge und Aktivitäten pro Person.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total des excursions et activités par personne.

inputs.label: Miscellaneous Cost
inputs.businessContext: Extra expenses such as souvenirs, tips, and transport.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra expenses such as souvenirs, tips, and transport.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hatıra eşyası, bahşiş ve ulaşım gibi ekstra harcamalar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Ausgaben wie Souvenirs, Trinkgelder und Transport.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses supplémentaires telles que souvenirs, pourboires et transport.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
